title: Kéral Longknife
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Tsyriel1.jpg]] |name=Kéral Longknife |homeworld=[[Shiva IV]][[Star Wars (1977) 53|''Star Wars'' (1977) 53]] |birth= |death= |species=[[T'Syriél]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Yellow]] |skin=Orange |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Twelve Tribes of T'Syriél]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Guess who?"
"Hm?! Wellll—with that voice and that perfume, who else could it be but... Kéral Longknife!"
"Not quite.|[[Alisande]] attempts to sneak up on her husband, Aron Peacebringer|}} '''Kéral Longknife''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[T'Syriél]] who served as the [[Demarch]] of the [[Twelve Tribes of T'Syriél]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shiva IV]] during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Longknife signed the [[Concordat of Peace]] with [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Aron Peacebringer]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Calian Confederacy]], ending generations of warfare between the two peoples. Afterward, the two became [[blood brother]]s and close companions, and the [[3 ABY/Legends|next year]] worked together to foil an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] plot to conquer Shiva IV. ==Biography== {{Quote|Kéral! It is good to see you my brother! But what is that fuzzy giant by your side?"
"He is a Wookiee, Aron, called Chewbacca, and he is as formidable of a warrior as I have ever met.|Aron Peacebringer and Kéral Longknife|[[Star Wars (1977) 54|''Star Wars'' (1977) 54]]}} A [[T'Syriél]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] native of the remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shiva IV]], Kéral Longknife was the [[Demarch]] of his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld's]] ancient and proud [[Twelve Tribes of T'Syriél]] during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Although the T'Syriél had traditionally been at war with the [[Human/Legends|Humans]] of the [[Calian Confederacy]], around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]] Longknife signed the [[Concordat of Peace]] with Calian [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Aron Peacebringer]], ending generations of conflict. In doing so, Longknife and Peacebringer became [[blood brother]]s, and were at each others' sides during campaigns to come. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Longknife joined Peacebringer and two of his Calian companions, [[Jain Havero]] and [[Ygal Delois]], to investigate the sudden severing of communications between the Calian [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Illyriaqüm]] and the [[City/Legends|city]] [[K'avor]]. Along the way, they rescued a young offworlder woman named [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], an important [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leader who had crash-landed on Shiva IV, and was being menaced by T'Syriél outcasts, and proceeded onward to find K'avor utterly destroyed in mysterious fashion. Several weeks later, they learned the cause: an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|General]] named [[Bentilais san Sk'ar]] had conspired with Delois to conquer the world and install Delois as its new ruler, and had tested a devastating [[anti-matter bomb]] on K'avor. As Peacebringer and Organa raced to prevent Sk'ar and Delois from unleashing another such weapon on Illyriaqüm, Longknife linked up with two of Organa's Rebel comrades, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], who had tracked Organa to Shiva IV and arrived in the nick of time. Longknife and the Rebels provided reinforcement to Peacebringer as they battled the Imperials, ultimately foiling Sk'ar's plan and keeping Shiva IV free. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|I am ashamed, my brother. In happier times—before our two races signed the Concordat of Peace—a warrior of the 12 Tribes would die rather than flee from you nightskins.|Kéral Longknife|}} Although Kéral Longknife was heir to generations of enmity between the T'Syriél and the Calians, he and his blood-brother Aron Peacebringer had a different vision for their homeworld's future, forging a close companionship and bringing peace to Shiva IV together. However, Longknife took a dim view at times of his people's progression after the Concordat of Peace, lamenting their loss of bravery in battle. However, his loyalty to his blood-brother was strong, and Longknife was quick to rush to Peacebringer's aid when the battle with the Imperials became dire. Longknife was extremely impressed by the fighting might of the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] Chewbacca, regarding him as one of the finest warriors he had ever encountered. ==Behind the scenes== Kéral Longknife first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 53|''Star Wars'' (1977) 53]], written by [[Chris Claremont]] and released in [[1981]]. In his two appearances in the original [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel ''Star Wars'']] comic series, Longknife's name is spelled two different ways: Kéral in ''Star Wars'' 53, Kerál in [[Star Wars (1977) 54|''Star Wars'' (1977) 54]]. However, the inconsistency was cleared up in later mentions, which spelled his name Kéral.{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/97/indexp4.html|series=Aliens in the Empire|text=Part 2: To a Traitor Go the Spoils}}''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 53|''Star Wars'' (1977) 53]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 53}} {{1st}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 54|''Star Wars'' (1977) 54]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 54}} ==Sources== *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/97/indexp4.html|series=Aliens in the Empire|text=Part 2: To a Traitor Go the Spoils}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|character|aronpeacebringer|Peacebringer, Aron}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kéral Langmesser }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Longknife, Kéral}} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Planetary leaders]] [[Category:Shiva IV residents]] [[Category:T'Syriél]]
